caption: A woman with short dark hair and glasses is captured against a plain dark gray background, appearing to speak and gesture with her hands. She wears a light green top featuring a decorative embroidered neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene. Throughout the sequence, she remains in a medium shot, centered in the frame. Her expression is focused, with her mouth open as she speaks. She uses her hands to emphasize her points, bringing them closer together and moving her fingers slightly as the sequence progresses. The lighting remains consistent, and there are no other people or objects present in the environment, creating a minimalist setting focused entirely on the presenter.
